meta.description: Issue #143 – P0: Empfängt Stripe Webhooks, verifiziert Signatur, mappt Daten und erstellt CiviCRM-Contributions mit Retry-Logik.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ records: [{ contact_type: 'Individual', email_primary.email: $('map-to-civicrm').item.json.payer_email, display_name: $('map-to-civicrm').item.json.payer_name }], match: ['email_primary.email'] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ stripe_event_id: $('map-to-civicrm').item.json.stripeEventId, civicrm_contribution_id: $json.values?.[0]?.id, amount: $('map-to-civicrm').item.json.amount, currency: $('map-to-civicrm').item.json.currency, payer_email: $('map-to-civicrm').item.json.payer_email, status: 'completed', processed_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ email: $('map-to-civicrm').item.json.payer_email, contact_id: $('map-to-civicrm').item.json.civicrmPayload.contact_id, amount: $('map-to-civicrm').item.json.amount, currency: $('map-to-civicrm').item.json.currency, purpose: 'Spende', provider: 'stripe', trxn_id: $('map-to-civicrm').item.json.originalCharge.id }) }}

parameters.subject: [MOE] Stripe Zahlung fehlgeschlagen – {{ $json.charge.id }}
